text.title: Accessibility Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: pricing-page audit finds 2 failures (placeholder contrast + 1 div-button), report after repair returns verdict=pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Pre-launch a11y sweep on `/pricing`. Designer used `<div role="button">` for the "Choose plan" CTA; placeholder text on the email input is grey (#aaa).

section.title: First-pass report (fail)
